result: The task has been successfully completed. The cleaned and merged dataset with GHQ-12 psychological distress scores across four survey sweeps has been saved as 'data/output/cleaned_data.csv'. The file contains the ID variable (NSID) and eight derived GHQ variables: ghq15, ghq17, ghq25, ghq32 (pre-derived scores) and ghqtl15, ghqtl17, ghqtl25, ghqtl32 (manually computed sum scores).
